mdSummary:
# AspectRatio

Constrains child content to a fixed width-to-height ratio.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Layout
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/aspect-ratio

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| AspectRatio | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| AspectRatio | Ratio | `double` | `1` |  |
| AspectRatio | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| AspectRatio | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (AspectRatio) — RenderFragment slot

- (none)

- (none)

- (none)

## Example

